title: Denise Wohl
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Denise Wohl''' is a comic book letterer who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Letterer===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 14|''Star Wars'' (1977) 14]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]''

[[Category:Comic book letterers]]
